sections.title: After passing or failing the exam

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: To exit, use any of the doors in this room.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: Ah, it's you [player name]. You've been slacking in your studies, so it's time for an exam.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: There are two types of question. One type requires you to find the next object in a pattern.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: In the second type I will present you with fifteen cards and a hint. Discover three cards related to the hint, select them and confirm.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: Let's continue your exam. There are two types of question: In one question you must discover the logical object to come next in a pattern.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: In the second type I will present you with fifteen cards and a hint. Discover three cards related to the hint, select them and confirm.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: Pick the object that should come next in the pattern.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: No. No, that's not right at all. Okay, next question.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: Remember, the goal here is to find the pattern. Look for objects that would have a connection to each other.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: That's WRONG. Take your time and think about the next question.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: No, no, no... That's WRONG! Okay, next question.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: How unfortunate, you FAILED. You'd better hit the books and study up for next time.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: To exit, use any of the doors in this room.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: Wonderful! Keep up the good work. Next question.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: Finally, a pupil using [his/her/their] brains rather than trying to eat them. Next question.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: That's correct! Next question.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: WELL DONE! You've proven your aptitude for pattern recognition. You'll receive a book once you leave the classroom. It is a Book of Knowledge to further your education.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: To exit, use any of the doors in this room.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: WELL DONE! You've proven your aptitude for pattern recognition.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: Hmm, you already appear to have a Book of Knowledge. You should read that! Still, I will reward you for your work once you leave the room.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: To exit, use any of the doors in this room.

lines.speaker: Mr. Mordaut
lines.text: Examine the hint on the right and find three objects that are related to it.
